intent: Log in as problem_user and browse the catalogue. Product images should load and show the correct product.
step: Check that each product thumbnail shows the correct product image
observed_behavior: All six product thumbnails render the same image (a dog photo, sl-404.jpg) instead of the distinct product photos. The product names and prices are correct.
agent_reasoning: Each product should have its own image. They are all identical and unrelated to the product, which looks like a broken asset mapping.
